about.title: Why Choose Me?
about.intro: I am Tibor Czimber, an experienced carpenter. My goal is to create unique and durable woodworking solutions perfectly tailored to your needs.
about.experience_desc: Extensive experience in Hungarian and Austrian projects.
about.uniqueness_desc: Solutions tailored to your property and your specific needs.
about.partnership_desc: Collaboration with private clients and professionals alike.

story.label: How I became who I am
story.title: From the Stage to the Workshop
story.subtitle: A life journey built on precision
story.act1_text: For years I worked in the scenery workshop of the Hevesi Sándor Theatre in Zalaegerszeg. There I learned: wood is not just material – it is a story. One poorly fitted board can ruin the entire production. Zero tolerance for error.
story.act2_text: I carried that stage precision with me when I decided: homes deserve the same level of attention. Every built-in wardrobe, every kitchen is a production – one that the owner enjoys for decades.
story.act3_text: Today I carry out every project with the same care as I once built stage sets: millimetre-precise, on time, knowing that my work will last.

services.motto: "From design to execution, I strive for perfection at every step to create unique and timeless solutions."
services.kitchen_desc: Functional and stylish kitchens where cooking becomes an experience. Tailored to your needs, from quality materials.
services.custom_desc: Built-in wardrobes, closets, and shelving systems that harmoniously fit the space.
services.stairs_desc: Safe, durable, and aesthetic wooden stairs and interior elements that give character to your home.
services.assembly_desc: With extensive experience, I undertake professional kitchen and furniture assembly for manufacturers and distributors.

gallery.title: Portfolio
gallery.subtitle: Take a look at some of my previous projects, created with quality and precision in mind.
